title: GateResult
description: Structured output from a gate evaluation (launch review, PR review, merge gate, post-merge health gate). Captures the decision, evidence, and machine-readable markers for downstream control-plane consumers. Aligned with docs/ai-native/gate-result-schema.md.

decision.description: Gate outcome. pass = all checks cleared. block = hard failure. warn = advisory finding. override = repo-owner bypass with justification.

severity.description: Severity of the gate finding. info for pass, warning for advisory, error for blockable issues, critical for security or data-loss risk.

markerId.description: Machine-readable idempotency marker (e.g. issue-88-launch, pr-90-review). Used by the result publisher to update-or-create comments.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the gate evaluation completed.

targetIssue.description: GitHub issue number this gate evaluated, if applicable.

targetPR.description: GitHub PR number this gate evaluated, if applicable.

source.description: Path or URL to the fact source (e.g. docs/ai-native/launch-gate.md, .github/ai-state/main-health.json).

summary.description: One-line summary of what was read from this source.

factsRead.description: Evidence sources the gate consulted before making its decision.

code.description: Machine-readable blocker code (e.g. MAIN_RED, CONFLICT_GROUP_DUPLICATE, BUILD_FAIL).

blockers.description: Hard failures that prevent pass or override.

warnings.description: Advisory findings that do not block the gate.

value.description: Fact value. May be a string, number, boolean, or object.

producedFacts.description: Structured facts this gate produced for downstream consumers.

overrideJustification.description: Required when decision is override. Documents why the repo-owner chose to bypass the gate.
